children.label: A
children.text: not more than the lesser of 33 1/3 percent or $2,000,000 may be allocated to implement regional projects by the United States Fish and Wildlife Service, as selected by the Director under ; andsection 941c(e) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: the lesser of 3 percent or $300,000 shall be allocated to the United States Fish and Wildlife Service to cover costs incurred in administering the proposals by any entity; and

$2,000,000, which shall be allocated for the activities of the Upper Great Lakes Fish and Wildlife Conservation Offices and the Lower Great Lakes Fish and Wildlife Conservation Office under .section 941e of this title

children.heading: Prohibition on use of funds for Federal acquisition of interests in land
children.label: b Prohibition on use of funds for Federal acquisition of interests in land
children.text: No funds appropriated or used to carry out this chapter may be used for acquisition by the Federal Government of any interest in land.
